journey.name: 11-books
journey.description: 账本管理：新建/编辑/切换/删除。删除为不可逆破坏性操作，置于全套最后。

actions.action: Open the navigation drawer and navigate to the books (账本) management screen
Create a new book named "测试账本B"
Edit "测试账本B": change its description, then save
Switch the current book to "测试账本B"
Verify the home screen reflects the switched book (empty or B-specific records)
Verify "测试账本B" no longer appears in the books list and the app does not crash
